guardrail is built by a dedicated team and amazing community contributors.

The guardrail core team is responsible for the overall direction and maintenance of the project.

## Contributors

We're grateful to all our contributors who help make guardrail better!

### How to Become a Contributor

1. **Report bugs** - Help us find and fix issues
2. **Submit PRs** - Fix bugs or add features
3. **Improve docs** - Make our documentation better
4. **Help others** - Answer questions in Discord/GitHub
5. **Spread the word** - Share guardrail with others

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) for details on how to contribute.
